name: llm-observer-monorepo
description: Privacy-first LLM cost tracking for developers

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@llm-observer/database && npm run build --workspace=@llm-observer/dashboard && npm run build --workspace=@llm-observer/proxy && npm run build --workspace=@llm-observer/team-server && npm run build --workspace=llm-observer && npm run tauri build --workspace=desktop && npm run build --workspace=llm-observer-landing
scripts.build:ci: npm run build --workspace=@llm-observer/database && npm run build --workspace=@llm-observer/dashboard && npm run build --workspace=@llm-observer/proxy && npm run build --workspace=llm-observer && npm run build --workspace=llm-observer-landing

author: Ranjit Behera <ranjitbehera0034@gmail.com>
